summary: The AI market in early 2026 displays classic speculative bubble hallmarks: extreme valuation multiples, circular financing, keyword-driven stock surges, and physical energy grid constraints. Heat score reflects multi-factor analysis across financial, infrastructure, and sentiment indicators.
